title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 77.
content:
There was an Old Man of Jamaica,
    Who suddenly married a Quaker;
    But she cried out - "O lack!
    I have married a black!"
    Which distressed that Old Man of Jamaica.
meaning:
"Book Of Nonsense Limerick 77." is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
